symptom: CK cannot see a new script
likely cause: The script has not compiled to .pex, CK is using the wrong source/output view, or dependencies are missing
inspection path: Check compiled output folder, source include roots, mod-manager profile, and CK script picker
fix pattern: Compile the script with the correct imports, launch CK through the active profile, then reopen the form

symptom: CK crashes or behaves oddly while attaching a script to a new quest
likely cause: Quest form was not fully created before script attachment
inspection path: Close/OK the new quest record, reopen it, then use the Scripts Tab
fix pattern: Create the form first, then attach scripts and properties after reopening

symptom: Script property is None at runtime
likely cause: Property was never filled, target record changed, or stale VMAD/save state is being loaded
inspection path: Inspect CK properties, xEdit VMAD, Papyrus log, and test on a clean save
fix pattern: Fill the property in CK, remove stale duplicate VMAD if present, and test old-save migration separately

symptom: Duplicate same-name script attachments appear on a record
likely cause: Repeated CK/patch/merge operations added another VMAD script row instead of consolidating properties
inspection path: Inspect the owning record's VMAD Scripts array in xEdit
fix pattern: Choose one canonical script attachment, copy the property union, remove duplicates, then runtime-test

symptom: Story Manager event never reaches the quest
likely cause: Receiver quest is not linked to the correct event node, event quest shape is wrong, or conditions block startup
inspection path: Inspect Story Manager node, receiver quest Event field, Shares Event state, and receiver script logs
fix pattern: Wire the receiver under the correct event, keep conditions minimal until proven, and validate payloads in script

symptom: Story Manager receiver blocks other observers
likely cause: Receiver node does not share the event or consumes the event too narrowly
inspection path: Inspect Story Manager node settings and sibling receiver behavior
fix pattern: Use Shares Event where multiple mods or vanilla systems should observe the event

likely cause: Owning quest is not running, SEQ is missing/stale, aliases are unfilled, or conditions fail
inspection path: Check quest running state, SEQ file, alias fill, branch/topic/info conditions, and actor validity
fix pattern: Start or SEQ the quest as appropriate, mark aliases optional only when safe, and simplify conditions for proof

symptom: Dialogue appears in the wrong context
likely cause: Branch/topic/info conditions are too broad or priority/stacking is misunderstood
inspection path: Inspect Dialogue Views, Player Dialogue Tab, Topic stack, Quest Conditions, and INFO conditions
fix pattern: Move broad gates to quest/branch where appropriate and make each INFO condition explicit

symptom: Scene does not start or stalls
likely cause: Scene actor alias is unfilled, actor flags pause/end behavior, or phase conditions never pass
inspection path: Inspect Scenes Tab actor aliases, start conditions, phase completion rules, and Papyrus logs
fix pattern: Fix alias fill, actor flags, and phase conditions; keep fragments small and observable

symptom: Quest stage fragment cannot access intended script data
likely cause: Fragment scope, kmyQuest selection, or fragment property setup is wrong
inspection path: Inspect Quest Stage Fragment UI, generated fragment script, and fragment properties
fix pattern: Keep fragment tiny; route through a stable quest script, global event, or filled property

symptom: Start Game Enabled quest or dialogue works only after reload/noise
likely cause: SEQ file missing, stale, or packaged in the wrong output location
inspection path: Check Seq/<plugin>.seq in the shipped mod and confirm it matches the edited plugin
fix pattern: Regenerate SEQ after eligible quest/dialogue changes and package it with the plugin

symptom: Generated output lands in a shared overwrite or CK output mod
likely cause: CK/xEdit/MO2 output path is not owned by the target mod
inspection path: Inspect mod-manager overwrite, CK output mod, xEdit output mod, and target mod folders
fix pattern: Move or regenerate output into the intended mod and keep output mods inactive unless deliberately used

symptom: CK save adds unexpected overrides or masters
likely cause: Active file touched records accidentally or loaded dependencies became hard masters
inspection path: Inspect xEdit for new overrides, file header masters, ITM records, and wild edits
fix pattern: Remove accidental edits with xEdit after proving they are not intentional; keep masters minimal

symptom: Old save keeps impossible behavior after script or property edit
likely cause: Papyrus instances, properties, registered events, or old function versions are save-baked
inspection path: Test from a new game/main-menu start and compare with old save; inspect Papyrus logs
fix pattern: Design idempotent migration, unregister old events, clear stale properties, or require a new game for unsafe changes

symptom: CKPE-specific workflow fails on another setup
likely cause: Installed CKPE version or CK version differs from the documented setup
inspection path: Check local CK version, CKPE wiki support matrix/settings, and loader path
fix pattern: Record CK/CKPE versions and avoid treating CKPE behavior as vanilla CK behavior

symptom: Dialogue view graph is missing for collaborators
likely cause: Dialogue view XML was not distributed or load-order-derived filename changed
inspection path: Check Data/DialogueViews XML files and plugin/FormID naming
fix pattern: Package dialogue view XML when collaborator editability matters and document rename caveat

symptom: Papyrus log shows missing script or type mismatch
likely cause: Compiled output, dependency source, or plugin VMAD refers to a script the game cannot load
inspection path: Inspect Scripts output, VMAD script names, dependencies, and Papyrus log path
fix pattern: Ship the required .pex, remove stale VMAD references, and compile against the intended dependency set
